New
The power of a Windows laptop in a thin, light tablet
Build your device

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch (12th Edition) | Intel

4 images

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch (12th Edition) | Intel

This was added to your wishlist.

You added Surface Pro for Business - Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3), with LCD display, Wi-Fi+5G, Platinum, 32GB RAM, 256GB SSD to your wish list. You can share this list with others.

View wish list
Laptop performance, tablet flexibility—all in one ultra-portable device. Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 processors power demanding apps and all-day battery life so you can tackle the hardest workflows with ease.¹ Optional 5G gives you the flexibility needed to stay connected and productive from anywhere, be it your desk or on the go.²

Why buy from Microsoft Store

We offer free 2-3 day shipping, 60-day returns, and one-on-one product expert help in finding the best solution for your small business. If you buy a physical product and we lower the price within 60 days from delivery, contact us and we’ll refund you the difference. Terms apply.
Learn more

Up to $800 cash back with trade-in​

For a limited time, buy a Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch and get extra cash back with an eligible trade-in.​
Learn more

Starting From $1,949.99

Business financing available.

Spread out the cost of your purchase with low monthly payments.
Get started

Build your device

Sign in or create a work account now to get easy access to exclusive business discounts. Why sign in before shopping?

Using your work account now makes shopping easier. Learn more.

Items added before signing in will go into your personal cart. Signing in with your work account lets you add items directly to your business cart without having to start over.

Free 2-3 day shipping. Free returns.

Need Surface for Business at enterprise scale?
Find authorized resellers

For special business pricing, purchase with Purchase Order, or additional sales support, call us at 1 800-642-7676, Monday to Friday, 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM PT.

Overview Tech specs Sustainability Accessibility Compare

Design that adapts to your workstyle

Surface Pro is two devices in one

Alternate between a tablet you can write and draw on with Slim Pen and a laptop when you engage the built-in kickstand and pair Surface Pro with a keyboard.3

A rich, vivid display

See clearly, even when working outdoors, on a 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen, available with an optional anti-reflective OLED display for brighter colors and contrast.4,5,24 Swipe, scroll, and write smoothly with a refresh rate up to 120Hz.

Navigate your way—pen, touch, or voice

Switch seamlessly between a natural digital inking experience and a touchscreen responsive to intuitive gestures like drag and drop. Or go hands-free with voice commands.

Enhanced video calling

Join polished video calls with the ultrawide front camera enhanced with AI-powered Windows Studio Effects, and scan documents and capture sharp details with a high-resolution rear camera.6

Power to perform anywhere

Multitask like a pro with Intel®

Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 processors provide smooth and exceptionally fast performance to handle demanding apps and challenging creative workflows.

Take on AI tasks effortlessly

The built-in Neural Processing Unit (NPU) supports the processing of AI workloads locally, offloading work from the CPU for faster performance and improved efficiency to help you save time on work.

Unplug with up to 17 hours of battery

All-day battery life makes it easier to work from anywhere, then recharge in a snap with fast charging, supported via Surface Connect or USB-C®.1,7

Work from anywhere with optional 5G

Access data or check email no matter where you are—ultra-fast downloads and secure connectivity are just two of the many benefits of optional 5G.2

Reduce lag with more RAM and storage

With up to 64 GB of memory and 1 TB of storage, experience lightning-fast load times and read and write speeds.8 A removable solid-state drive helps support data retention.9

Stay connected with ultra-fast Wi-Fi & Bluetooth®

Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth® Core 5.4 provide the fastest wireless connectivity for ultra-reliable connections.10 Enjoy smooth calls and seamless pairing with accessories.

Unmatched flexibility, built-in accessibility

Transform Pro into a full desktop setup

Master multitasking when you extend your setup and enable split-screen workflows—Surface Pro for Business supports up to three 4K external monitors at 60Hz with compatible docks or through daisy chain.11

Find your perfect angle

Adjust the built-in kickstand to work on Pro as a laptop or a tablet at the most comfortable angle.

A flexible 2-in-1 keyboard

Pair your device with Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard for Business, which works attached or detached to adapt to work in any location.12,13

Control and comfort you can feel

Fine-tune click and haptic response on the precision haptic touchpad for intuitive control paired with a quiet, comfortable backlit keyboard.

Bold keyset option available

Larger, bold font, high contrast, and brighter backlighting make keys more visible for confident typing.14 

Secured by default to help keep your business safe

Designed with a Zero Trust mindset

Security is built into your device’s hardware, firmware, and software layers to help reduce risk and streamline remediation.

Out-of-the-box protections

Surface Pro for Business is a Secured-core PC with Windows 11 Pro, designed to help keep you protected against new and evolving threats with key recommended Windows security features on by default.

Sign in without a password

Windows Hello facial recognition, passkeys, and optional NFC reader (available on Wi-Fi models only) provide strong, passwordless authentication which helps to protect user credentials and supports secure access to data.15

Built for security above all else

Surface devices are secure by design, secure by default, and secure in operation—built to support your business’s compliance objectives and deliver trusted security from chip to cloud. Learn more

Built-in AI productivity for smarter work

Interact with Copilot your way

Type, swipe, sketch with Slim Pen, or use the dedicated key to interact with Copilot.16 Converse naturally with Voice in Microsoft 365 Copilot and it can help you organize tasks and create content.17,18 With Slim Pen, launch Copilot Voice or lasso-select images and text for assistance without breaking your flow.3

Get more done with Microsoft 365 Copilot

Find answers and multitask better. Copilot brings your files, meetings, emails, and more together all within the Microsoft 365 apps you use every day like Word, PowerPoint, and Excel.19

Quickly find what you’re looking for

Improved Windows Search saves you time by finding files fast even if you forget their name.20 Just describe what you’re looking for—images, files, apps, and more.

Stay in your flow with Click to Do

Click to Do analyzes text and images on your screen and serves up suggestions, so you can work smarter.21 Use it to rewrite content, summarize reports, enhance images, and collaborate with Copilot—all without switching apps.

Customize your Copilot

Create and use custom Copilots right in your workflow using natural language or a graphical interface. With Copilot Studio, you can easily design, test, and publish AI agents for your needs.22

Connect across languages with live captions

Live captions instantly translate speech and add subtitles in real-time to meetings and local videos, so everyone can follow along together.23

Microsoft Protection Plans for added peace of mind

With several different plans to choose from, get the coverage you need to protect your investment—from mechanical breakdowns to accidental damage—with extended coverage and technical support.

Frequently asked questions

|

  • A Copilot+ PC is a PC built for AI experiences, with a powerful NPU that can run AI tasks on the device. This helps enable faster, more efficient AI features while keeping work moving smoothly, even when you’re multitasking or on the go.

  • Yes. Some Surface models come with 5G, but not all Surface devices include cellular connectivity. If you want 5G, make sure you choose a configuration that specifically lists 5G support. 

    5G-enabled Surface devices work with a mobile data plan using either a physical SIM card (nano SIM) or eSIM, depending on the model. 

  • You can buy Surface business Pros directly from Microsoft Store. Availability of business laptop financing and payment options may vary by region and seller, allowing organizations to choose purchasing options that fit their budget and procurement needs.

  • Surface Pro for Business stands out as one of the top laptops for business and personal use, delivering powerful performance, ultra-portability, and enterprise-grade security in a versatile 2-in-1 design. Built for professionals on the go, it seamlessly replaces both a tablet and a laptop. Powered by Intel® Core™ Ultra processors and Windows 11 Pro, it supports touch, pen, and keyboard workflows with reliable, manageable performance for work and everyday tasks.

  • Surface Pro for Business is a lightweight business laptop that’s easy to bring anywhere. It comes with Windows 11 Pro and runs Microsoft Office apps and other productivity tools, so you can stay on top of work without being weighed down. With its portable 2-in-1 design and strong performance, it’s a great option if you’re looking for a lightweight business laptop.

  • Intel and Qualcomm Snapdragon® processors differ mainly in architecture and efficiency. Intel Core Ultra processors are widely used in traditional Windows PCs and are known for broad software compatibility and performance. Qualcomm Snapdragon® processors use ARM technology, prioritizing power efficiency and battery life. Both run Windows, but they can deliver different performance, battery, and feature experiences depending on the device. 

  • LCD (Liquid Crystal Display) screens use a backlight to display images with consistent brightness and sharp resolution, making them well suited for everyday tasks like email, web browsing, document work, and video calls. OLED (Organic Light Emitting Diode) screens light each pixel individually to display images with deeper blacks, higher contrast, and support for HDR, making them a step up for creative work, media viewing, and immersive content. 

  • Yes. On Surface devices running Windows 11 Pro, you can manage Copilot and AI experiences in Windows Settings, including hiding Copilot from the taskbar and adjusting privacy settings for your device. You can choose which experiences you use, so you stay in control. 

  • Recall is available on Copilot+ PCs. If you’re shopping, confirm the device is labeled Copilot+ PC, since standard Windows 11 PCs don’t include Recall. Availability can vary by market/region, and you may need the latest Windows updates to see it on your device. 

  • Consumer Surface devices are designed for personal use, while Surface for Business models are built for work environments and come with Windows 11 Pro preinstalled. Business devices may also offer business‑only configurations such as 5G, extended warranty and service options, and enhanced support for security and IT management, including easier deployment, device controls, and long‑term support for organizations.

  • Contact Microsoft Support to troubleshoot the issue, check your warranty coverage, and submit a repair or service request. From there, you can select your device, review service options, and track repair status or order details to get back up and running quickly.

  • Surface Pro supports two detachable keyboard options. The Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard works attached or detached, giving you greater freedom to present, sketch, or move around while staying productive. The Pro 13-inch Keyboard is designed to stay attached, delivering a stable, laptop like typing experience for focused work. Both include backlit keys, precision trackpads, and built in pen storage to match different work styles. 

  • First, find your device model in  Settings > System > About  (Surface users can also check the Surface app). Then review the accessory’s product page under Specs, Compatibility, or Works with to confirm it supports your model. For some accessories, also check fit (screen size) or connection type (USB-C, Bluetooth, etc.). 

  • Yes. Microsoft Store offers flexible payment options for eligible purchases, including installment plans and pay-over-time options where available. To use one, select an eligible item, add it to your cart, and—if offered—choose a payment plan during checkout to split your purchase into manageable payments.

End of Shop other products

Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
Learn more

Do more and save with your free work account​

Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
Learn more

Fast shipping and free returns

Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
Some exclusions apply.*
See shipping details Learn about returns

60-day price protection

Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment.
﻿﻿﻿﻿Exclusions apply.*
Learn more about price protection

Work worry-free with extended coverage

Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.
Learn about protection plans

*See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on microsoft.com website only.

Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.
Offer valid with purchases of any Surface Pro 10 for Business, 5G, Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch | Intel; Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 12-inch | Snapdragon; Surface Pro for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch | Snapdragon; Surface Laptop for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13-inch | Snapdragon; Surface Laptop for Business, Copilot+ PC, 15-inch | Intel; Surface Laptop for Business, Copilot+ PC, 15-inch | Snapdragon; Surface Laptop for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13.8-inch | Intel; Surface Laptop for Business, Copilot+ PC, 13.8-inch | Snapdragon, between April 1, 2026 – June 30, 2026 (the “Promotion Period”) after trade in of qualifying device where the customer submits the online trade-in claim for their used device, plus proof of purchase for new device, during the Promotion Period, while supplies last. Available only through the Microsoft Store online in the United States. To be eligible for the reimbursement, the customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device within 15 days of completing the online trade-in process. Offer valid for reimbursement after trade in of a qualifying device (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, or video game console). To be eligible for trade in, (i) you must own the qualifying device, (ii) the device must power on, (iii) the battery must hold a charge (the device must  not be required to be plugged in to operate), and (iv) the device must be in fully-functional, working condition and not have broken or missing components, a cracked display or screen, liquid damage, modification(s) or the device warranty seal broken. The device cannot be password protected and must include its original chargers, accessories, and hard drive. Trade in value depends on device type and condition after inspection by Teladvance. All trade-ins and reimbursements are subject to Teladvance’s sole discretion and approval. Devices determined to not meet eligibility criteria may be shipped back to the customer or recycled. Recycled devices are not eligible for cash back. All trade-ins are final. See Microsoft Store Trade-in Program for steps and requirements. Not valid on prior orders or purchases; cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Price discount does not include taxes, shipping, or other fees. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time. Limit of 1 trade-in per new Surface device purchase per customer, up to a maximum of 25 trade-ins per customer.
  • USB Type-C® and USB-C® are registered trademarks of USB Implementers Forum.
  • [1] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, ambient lighting, and other factors. See Surface battery performance.
  • [2] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [3] Pen and keyboard sold separately.
  • [4] OLED is only available with Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor configurations.
  • [5] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13 inches diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [6] Copilot+ PCs feature. Requires built-in camera; available effects vary by device. See Copilot+ PC FAQs.
  • [7] Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface Power Supply or minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in February 2026. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [8] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface storage options for more details.
  • [9] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [10] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [11] Supporting three external displays requires either two displays connected to a compatible dock or connected through daisy chain.
  • [12] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.
  • [13] Detached use requires Windows 11.
  • [14] Bold keyset option available only in US English.
  • [15] NFC available with Wi-Fi only models.
  • [16] Copilot key feature availability varies by market, see Keyboard shortcuts in Windows.
  • [17] Voice focus requires activation, requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.
  • [18] Microsoft 365 Copilot license required. Supports multiple languages; some features only available in English. See what’s new in Voice Access.
  • [19] Requires eligible Microsoft 365 license. File upload and image generation limits apply.
  • [20] Improved Windows search works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimized for select languages [English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish]. 
  • [21] Copilot+ PC feature. Image actions now available across devices; other actions vary by device, region, language, and character sets. Subscription required for some actions. Some actions require a subscription See Copilot+ PC FAQs.
  • [22] Requires Microsoft 365 along with tenant and per user licensing.
  • [23] Translation for video and audio subtitles into English from 40+ languages and from 27 languages into Chinese (Simplified).
  • [24] The Surface Pro for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.

Processor
  • Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor 335 (Series 3)
  • Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor 366H (Series 3)

NPU
Intel® AI Boost with 50 TOPS

Graphic
  • Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor (Series 3):
    • Intel® Graphics
  • Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor (Series 3):
    • Intel® Graphics

Memory and storage3
  • Memory options: 16GB, 32GB or 64GB LPDDR5x RAM
  • Storage options: Removable4 solid-state drive (Gen 4) 256GB, 512GB and 1TB

Display

OLED display:

  • Touchscreen 13-inch5  PixelSense™ Flow display
  • Resolution: 2880 x 1920 (267 PPI)
  • Aspect ratio: 3:2
  • Contrast ratio: 1M:1
  • Dynamic refresh rate: up to 120Hz
  • Color profile:
    • SDR mode: sRGB and Vivid 
    • HDR mode: HDR
  • Individually color-calibrated display
  • Adaptive color
  • Adaptive contrast
  • Auto color management
  • Touch: 10-point multi-touch
  • Dolby Vision IQ™ support6
  • Strengthened glass display
  • Anti-reflective, ISO 9241-307 certified7
  • Brightness:
    • SDR:  600 nits maximum (typical)
    • HDR: 900 nits peak luminance8

LCD display: 

  • Touchscreen 13-inch5 PixelSense™ Flow display
  • Resolution: 2880 x 1920 (267 PPI)
  • Aspect ratio: 3:2
  • Contrast ratio: 1300:1
  • Dynamic refresh rate: up to 120Hz
  • Color profile:
    • SDR mode: sRGB and Vivid
    • HDR mode: HDR
  • Individually color-calibrated display
  • Adaptive color
  • Adaptive contrast
  • Auto color management
  • Touch: 10-point multi-touch
  • Dolby Vision IQ™ support6
  • Strengthened glass display
  • Anti-reflective, ISO 9241-307 certified7
  • Brightness:
    • SDR: 600 nits maximum (typical)
    • HDR: 600 nits peak luminance8

Size and Weight9,10
  • Length: 11.3 inch (287 mm)
  • Width: 8.2 inch (209 mm)
  • Height: 0.37 inch (9.3 mm)

Wi-Fi only models

  • Weight: 1.97 lbs (895 g)

Wi-Fi + 5G models

  • Weight: 2.00 lbs (906 g)

Battery life

Wi-Fi only models - connected using Wi-Fi

  • Up to 17 hours of local video playback11
  • Up to 11 hours of active web usage12

Security
  • Windows 11 Secured-core PC
  • Enterprise grade security with integrated TPM 2.0 and BitLocker support
  • Microsoft Pluton security processor
  • Windows Hello facial recognition with Enhanced Sign-in Security 

Wi-Fi only models

  • NFC authentication

Firmware

  • Surface UEFI built with Patina and Project Mu open‑source components available through the Open Device Partnership (ODP)
  • Firmware built with Secured Embedded Controller project open-source components available through ODP
  • Updated through Windows Update

Cameras
  • Quad HD front-facing Surface Studio Camera
    • 1440p Quad HD camera with ultrawide field of view
  • Support for Windows Studio Effects with automatic framing, eye contact, portrait blur and background blur
  • 10 MP Ultra HD rear-facing camera 
  • Windows Hello face authentication camera with Enhanced Sign-in Security

Audio
  • Dual Studio Mics with voice focus13
  • 2W stereo speakers with Dolby Atmos®14
  • Support for Bluetooth® LE Audio

Ports and charging
  • 2 X USB-C® with USB4®/Thunderbolt™ 4 with support for:
    • Charging
    • Data transfer
    • DisplayPort 2.1 with support up to three 4K monitors at 60Hz15
    • Surface Thunderbolt™ 4 Dock and other accessories
  • Supports fast charging with minimum 60W charger via Surface Connect or USB-C®16
  • Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard port
  • Surface Connect port
Wi-Fi + 5G models
  • NanoSIM

Pen & keyboard compatibility20

Pen compatibility  

  • Designed for Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition) 
    • Integrated storage and wireless charging for Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition) with Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard and Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard21
  • Supports tactile signals with Surface Slim Pen (2nd Edition)
  • Supports Microsoft Pen Protocol (MPP)  

Keyboard compatibility 

See Compatibility Details

Network and connectivity

Wi-Fi only models

  • Wi-Fi 717
  • Bluetooth® Core 5.4 technology

Wi-Fi + 5G models

  • Wi-Fi 717
  • Bluetooth® Core 5.4 technology
  • Location: GNSS L1, GPS, Galileo, BeiDou, QZSS and NAVIC support18
  • NanoSIM and eSIM support19
  • Supports 5G2
  • Cellular 
    • Wi-Fi hotspot support (up to 8 connected devices)
    • 5G-NR SA/NSA, Release 15, DL 256 QAM up to 2.9 Gbps, 4x4 MIMO, UL 256 QAM 
    • 4G Gigabit LTE – Advanced Pro, Release 15, DL Cat 19 up to 1.6 Gbps, 256QAM, 4x4 MIMO, 5x DL CA, UL Cat 18, 256 QAM, Contiguous 2x ULCA 
    • 5G-NR Bands
      n1, n2, n3, n5, n7, n8, n12, n14, n20, n25, n26, n28, n29, n30, n38, n40, n41, n48, n66, n71, n77, n78, n79
    • LTE Bands
      1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 8, 12, 13, 14, 19, 20, 25, 26, 28, 29, 30, 38, 39, 40, 41, 42, 48, 66, 71
    • WCDMA Bands
      1, 2, 4, 5, 8

Software
  • Windows 11 Pro
  • Preloaded Microsoft 365 Apps22
  • Microsoft 365 Business Standard, Microsoft 365 Business Premium, or Microsoft 365 Apps 30-day trial23

Accessibility
  • Optional bold keyset available on Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage for Business and Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard for Business24
  • Compatible with Surface precision haptic touchpad built into Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard for Business
  • Compatible with Surface Adaptive Kit25
  • Compatible with Microsoft adaptive accessories25
  • Includes Windows Accessibility Features – Learn More Accessible Technology, Products & Innovation | Microsoft Accessibility
  • Discover more Microsoft Accessible Devices & Products - Accessible Accessories for Business | Microsoft Store

Sustainability

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch is designed with sustainability in mind

Recycled materials

  • 86% recycled content in the enclosure, including 100% recycled aluminum alloy and 100% recycled rare earth metals in the magnets.26
  • 100% recycled rare earth metals in all magnets.28
  • 100% recycled cobalt contained in battery cell.27
  • 100% recycled tin contained in solder paste.28
  • 100% recycled gold on motherboard.28
  • 100% recycled copper in the motherboard28
  • 50% recycled copper in thermal assembly cold plate.28

Thoughtful packaging  

  • 77% recycled content in wood-based fiber commercial packaging29
  • Paper-based, minimizing plastic use
  • 100% of our virgin paper sourced comes from responsibly managed forests30

Repairability

  • Clear visual icons and built-in access to repair instructions32

Surface Trade-in  

  • We make trade-in convenient and secure for our commercial customers in the USA at Microsoft Trade In Program

In January 2020, Microsoft committed to be carbon negative, water positive, and achieve zero waste by 2030. Learn more about how we design with sustainability in mind at Microsoft Surface Sustainability

 

Serviceability

Replacement components include:32

  • Display module
  • Removable solid-state drive
  • Battery
  • Motherboard (including main processor and main memory)
  • Surface Connect
  • Thermal module
  • Microphone module (Including IR Camera)
  • Solid-state drive door
  • Speakers
  • Enclosure (bucket) 
  • Front camera
  • Rear camera
  • Power and volume buttons
  • Kickstand
  • Device entry kit

Wi-Fi+5G models

  • Sim card access tool

Exterior
  • Casing: Anodized aluminum 
  • Colors: Platinum, black33
  • Physical Buttons: Volume, Power 

Kickstand
Kickstand with 165 degrees full friction hinge

Sensors
  • Ambient color sensor
  • Accelerometer
  • Gyroscope
  • Magnetometer

Wi-Fi only models

  • NFC

What's in the box
  • Surface Pro for Business
  • 39W Power Supply with Surface Connect (In select markets, available only with specific configurations)
  • Quick Start Guide
  • Safety and warranty documents

Warranty34
1-year limited hardware warranty

Battery Capacities9

Surface Pro for Business with LCD display

  • Battery Capacity Nominal (Wh) 47
  • Battery Capacity Min (Wh) 46

Surface Pro for Business with OLED display

  • Battery Capacity Nominal (Wh) 53
  • Battery Capacity Min (Wh) 51
[1] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, ambient lighting, and other factors. See Surface battery performance.
  • [2] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [3] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface storage options for more details.
  • [4] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [5] Surface display has rounded corners within a standard rectangle. When measured as a standard rectangular shape the screen is 13” diagonally (actual viewable area is less).
  • [6] Requires Dolby Vision® encoded content and video.
  • [7] The Surface Pro for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
  • [8] HDR requires HDR content and enabling HDR in device settings.
  • [9] Might vary depending on manufacturing processes.
  • [10] Weight not including Keyboard.
  • [11] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro, 13-inch (12th Edition) with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5, 16GB, 256GB, (LCD) and Intel® Core™ Ultra 7, 16GB, 512GB (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi + 5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors.
  • [12] Based on a web browsing test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface Pro, 13-inch (12th Edition) with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5, 16GB, 256GB, (LCD) and Intel® Core™ Ultra 7, 16GB, 512GB (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge while accessing twelve popular websites over multiple open tabs through the browser. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi + 5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors. 
  • [13] Voice focus requires activation, requires Windows 11 and is available in apps which use integrated device microphones and use certain Windows audio processing modes.
  • [14] Requires Dolby Atmos® encoded content/audio.
  • [15] External monitor support requires compatible displays, cables, and accessories. See Surface tested peripherals page for compatibility information.
  • [16] In select markets, only specific configurations come with Surface Power Supply. Fast charging is supported with minimum 65W Surface Power Supply or minimum 60W USB Type-C® PD charger or higher, sold separately. Testing conducted by Microsoft in February, 2026. For details on fast charging see USB-C® and fast charging for Surface - Microsoft Support.
  • [17] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [18] Available positioning systems vary by country/region and activate based on device location.
  • [19] Wi-Fi+5G Models only. Support may vary by market and carrier.
  • [20] Pen and keyboard sold separately.
  • [21] Applies to Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard with pen storage, Surface Pro 13-inch Flex Keyboard, and Surface Pro Signature Keyboard.
  • [22] Sold separately. Software license required for some features.
  • [23] Activation required. If your device is managed by your organization’s IT department, contact your IT administrator for activation. After 30 days, you will be charged the applicable monthly or annual subscription fee. Credit card required. Cancel any time to stop future charges. See M365 Business Trial Info.
  • [24] Bold keyset option available only in US English in select markets.
  • [25] Sold separately.
  • [26] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024.
  • [27] Device (excluding power supply), contains 5.1% recycled cobalt, consisting of 100% recycled cobalt in the battery cell. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024. Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [28] Device (excluding power supply), contains 3.7% recycled content, consisting of 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets, 100% recycled tin in solder, 50% recycled copper in thermal plate, 100% recycled copper and 100% recycled gold in the motherboard. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024 Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021.
  • [29] Applies to sales packaging. Based on internal analysis using IEEE Std 1680.1-2018. IEEE Standard for Environmental and Social Responsibility Assessment of Computers and Displays. 4.7.3.1 Required—Recycled content in wood-based fiber packaging.
  • [30] Sources must be Forest Stewardship Council certified.
  • [32] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Unless required by law, device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans.
  • [33] Colors available on selected models only. Available colors, sizes, finishes, and processors may vary by store, market, and configuration.
  • [34] Microsoft’s Limited Warranty is in addition to your consumer law rights.

Designed with sustainability in mind

Laptops are designed by Microsoft with an aim toward more responsible innovation. Learn more about sustainability at Surface.

Recycled materials

Surface Pro for Business features 100% recycled aluminum in the enclosure and 100% recycled copper in the motherboard, reducing virgin aluminum and copper required in these components.3,7

Thoughtful packaging

77% recycled content in wood-based fiber in commercial packaging.4

Energy efficient

Unplug longer with the freedom of all-day battery life.1 Settings like Auto Keyboard Backlight on the Surface Pro 13-inch Keyboard can help reduce power usage.

Easy repair with replacement parts

Surface Pro for Business is serviceable by design, with internal wayfinding marks and a removable SSD. Plus, the new Surface Repair Tool lets you and independent repairers diagnose and repair key components.5

[1] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, ambient lighting, and other factors. Surface battery performance.
  • [2] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [3] Enclosure includes bucket, kickstand 100% recycled aluminum alloy in bucket. 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets. Based on validation performed by Underwriter Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (ECVP) for Recycled Content, UL ECVP 2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024.
  • [4] Applies to sales packaging. Based on internal analysis using IEEE Std 1680.1-2018. IEEE Standard for Environmental and Social Responsibility Assessment of Computers and Displays. 4.7.3.1 Required—Recycled content in wood-based fiber packaging.
  • [5] Replacement components available through Surface Commercial authorized device resellers. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market and over time. See Surface service options - Surface | Microsoft Learn. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs.
  • [7] Device (excluding power supply), contains 3.7 % recycled content, consisting of 100% recycled rare earth metals in magnets, 100% recycled tin in solder, 50% recycled copper in thermal plate, 100% recycled copper and 100% recycled gold in the motherboard. Based on validation performed by Underwriters Laboratories, Inc. using Environmental Claim Validation Procedure (EVCP) for Recycled Content, UL EVCP-2809-2, Second Edition, dated June 2024 Recycled Content is defined in accordance with ISO 14021. 

Accessible by design, built for you

Through inclusive design and innovation, we strive to raise the bar on accessible technology. Learn more about accessibility at Surface.

Free accessibility support

Disability Answer Desk—Free support for businesses of any size using Microsoft products.
Learn More
[1] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, ambient lighting, and other factors. See Surface battery performance.
  • [2] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.

Choose the right device configuration for your business

Shop all Surface for Business devices
New

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch (12th Edition) | Intel

  • Processor: Intel® Core™ Ultra 5 processor 335 (Series 3) or Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor 366H (Series 3)
  • Memory: 16 GB, 32 GB, or 64 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)
  • Storage: Removable solid-state drive (Gen 4) 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB3,4
  • Battery life: Wi-Fi only models connected using Wi-Fi: Up to 17 hours of local video playback5
  • NPU: Intel® AI Boost (50 TOPS)
  • Network: Wi-Fi 7 or optional 5G2,6
  • Display: 2880 x 1920, anti-reflective, optional OLED7 ,10
Build your device

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch (11th Edition) | Intel

  • Processor: Intel® Core™ Ultra processors (Series 2)
  • Memory: 16 GB or 32 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)
  • Storage: Removable solid-state drive (Gen 4 SSD) 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB3,4
  • Battery life: Up to 14 hours of local video playback8
  • NPU: Intel® AI Boost (40+ TOPS)
  • Network: Wi-Fi 76
  • Display: 2880 x 1920, anti-reflective, optional OLED
Learn more

Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch (11th Edition) | Snapdragon

  • Processor: Snapdragon® X Plus (10 Core) or Snapdragon® X Elite (12 Core)
  • Memory: 16 GB or 32 GB (LPDDR5x RAM)9
  • Storage: Removable solid-state drive (Gen 4 SSD) 256 GB, 512 GB, or 1 TB3,4,9
  • Battery life: Up to 14 hours of local video playback8
  • NPU: Qualcomm® Hexagon™ (45 TOPS)
  • Network: 5G or Wi-Fi 76
  • Display: 2880 x 1920, optional OLED
Learn more
[1] Based on local video playback test. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, ambient lighting, and other factors. See Surface battery performance. 
  • [2] 5G not available in all areas. Compatibility and performance depend on carrier network, plan and other factors. See carrier for details and pricing.
  • [3] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface storage options for more details.
  • [4] Drive Retention is only available on Microsoft Surface devices in which the Drive is marketed as removable in the technical specifications. Devices returned without a drive may incur a replacement fee unless covered by a Drive Retention benefit (sold separately). Available plans and options may vary by device and region. See Surface Warranty, Protection Plans & Support – Microsoft Surface for Business for details.
  • [5] Based on local video playback test. Testing conducted by Microsoft in April 2026 using preproduction software and preproduction Surface  Pro, 13-inch (12th Edition) with Intel® Core™ Ultra 5, 16GB, 256GB, (LCD) and Intel® Core™ Ultra 7, 16GB, 512GB (OLED) devices. Testing consisted of full battery discharge during video playback of a .mov file through the Windows Media Player application in 1080p at 24 FPS. All settings were default except screen brightness set to 150 nits with Auto-brightness disabled. Wi-Fi was connected to a network for Wi-Fi only models and cellular was connected to a cellular network for Wi-Fi + 5G models. Battery life varies significantly with settings, usage, and other factors. 
  • [6] 6GHz band not available in all regions.
  • [7] OLED is only available with Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 processor configurations.
  • [8] Based on video playback test. Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See Surface Battery Performance for details.
  • [9] 32GB memory and 1TB storage option available for Surface Pro for Business with Wi-Fi only.
  • [10] The Surface Pro for Business display has been designed to minimize unwanted reflections and has been certified by TÜV SÜD to meet the requirements of ISO 9241-307.
